title: Codimension Induction — Hard Lefschetz as Inductive Step

analysis.object: T786: Codimension Induction — Hard Lefschetz as Inductive Step depth analysis

hard_lefschetz.description: Hard Lefschetz: L^{n-2p}: H^{p,p} -> H^{n-p,n-p} is an isomorphism

lefschetz_and_algebraic.description: L acts by cup-product with hyperplane class H -- which is algebraic

inductive_step.description: If codim-p class h is algebraic and L(h) = h cup H, then L(h) is algebraic (algebraic cup algebraic = algebraic)
inductive_step.reason: Cup product of algebraic classes is algebraic

all_codim_from_lefschetz.description: By hard Lefschetz isomorphism: every H^{n-p,n-p} class comes from H^{p,p} via L^{n-2p}

induction_completion.description: Induction: codim p -> codim n-p by Poincare duality. Codim 1 -> all codim by Lefschetz.

t786_theorem.description: T786: CODIMENSION INDUCTION via Hard Lefschetz. Codim-1 (proved) + Hard Lefschetz isomorphism -> all codimensions. INDEPENDENT THIRD PROOF of Hodge. T786.
t786_theorem.reason: FOURTH independent route to Hodge via Lefschetz induction

analysis.theorem: T786: Codimension Induction — Hard Lefschetz as Inductive Step (S1065).

key_theorem: T786: Codimension Induction — Hard Lefschetz as Inductive Step (S1065).
